That’s especially true with Allen, who’ll replaced Zaire Franklin and run the defense from the Mike position. [...]

items.title: No trades for Colts’ Anthony Richardson Sr., Kenny Moore II

The three-day, seven-round, 257-pick NFL Draft ended Saturday evening without quarterback Anthony Richardson Sr. and cornerback Kenny Moore II being traded. That would have been an ideal time for the Colts to resolve trade requests two players submitted. In Richardson’s instance, no team was [...]
